languages.text: "Ксеносы есть ксеносы. Пошлите 32-ой полк уничтожать всех без разбору".
"Xenos are xenos. Send the 32nd Regiment to destroy all of them indiscriminately."
languages.original_text: "Ксеносы есть ксеносы. Пошлите 32-ой полк уничтожать всех без разбору".

traits.locale_text: "Xenos are xenos. Send the 32nd Regiment to destroy all of them indiscriminately."
"Xenos are xenos. Send the 32nd Regiment to destroy all of them indiscriminately."
"Xenos are xenos. Send the 32nd Regiment to destroy all of them indiscriminately."

languages.text: 「異種は異種だ。32連隊に全滅を命じろ。」
languages.original_text: "Xenos are xenos. Send the 32nd Regiment to destroy all of them indiscriminately."

traits.locale_text: 「異種は異種だ。32連隊に全滅を命じろ。」

languages.text: «Los xenos, xenos son. Envíen al 32.º regimiento a que acabe con todos ellos».
languages.original_text: "Xenos are xenos. Send the 32nd Regiment to destroy all of them indiscriminately."

traits.locale_text: «Los xenos, xenos son. Envíen al 32.º regimiento a que acabe con todos ellos».

languages.text: “异形就是异形。派遣第32团无差别歼灭所有目标。”
languages.original_text: "Xenos are xenos. Send the 32nd Regiment to destroy all of them indiscriminately."

traits.locale_text: “异形就是异形。派遣第32团无差别歼灭所有目标。”

languages.text: "Xenos sind Xenos. Befehlt dem 32. Regiment, sie alle zu töten ... ohne Ausnahme."
languages.original_text: "Xenos are xenos. Send the 32nd Regiment to destroy all of them indiscriminately."

traits.locale_text: "Xenos sind Xenos. Befehlt dem 32. Regiment, sie alle zu töten ... ohne Ausnahme."

languages.text: "Zeno zenodur. 32. Alay'ı gönderelim, ayrım gözetmeksizin hepsini yok etsinler."
languages.original_text: "Xenos are xenos. Send the 32nd Regiment to destroy all of them indiscriminately."

traits.locale_text: "Zeno zenodur. 32. Alay'ı gönderelim, ayrım gözetmeksizin hepsini yok etsinler."

languages.text: « Un xénos est un xénos. Que le 32e régiment les élimine tous, sans distinction. »
languages.original_text: "Xenos are xenos. Send the 32nd Regiment to destroy all of them indiscriminately."

traits.locale_text: « Un xénos est un xénos. Que le 32e régiment les élimine tous, sans distinction. »
